'''''Star Wars: Journey Through Space''''' is a young readers book written by [[Ryder Windham]] that was published by [[Dorling Kindersley|DK]] at reading level 2.

The title was [[Star Wars: Journey Through Space (2015)|reissued]] on [[January 19]], [[2015]] with new cover artwork and additional cover spreads throughout the book, adding 16 pages of content not found in the previous edition.<ref name="DK2015">{{DK|url=us/book/9781465433893-dk-readers-l2-star-wars-journey-through-space|text=DK Readers - ''Journey Through Space'' 2015 edition}}</ref>

{{Book-stub}}
